_about.title: Phases 2-4 — /site (demo+docs) + the A2UI gen-ui canvas, decomposed for a parallel fan-out
_about.serves: the button→demo→/site→A2UI-canvas vertical slice, Phases 2-4 (Phase 1 ui-button is G5-done). Phase 2+3 MERGED into one /site (one host-page mechanism). Phase 4 = render a 2-line A2UI payload into a LIVE ui-button.
_about.method: system-decompose, both planes. OUTSIDE-IN = two independent TRACKS (the /site track; the A2UI-canvas track) → slices. INSIDE-OUT = the capabilities Phases 2-4 deliver, anchored to the A1 runtime decomp's A2UI modules + the /site needs. The `wave`/`dep`/`files`/`build`/`acceptance` keys overlay the parallel build plan (the gate ignores them).
_about.ground_state: Phase 1 ui-button G5-done (controls/button/* + traits/press-activation.ts + the descriptor trip-wire + 12 cross-engine smoke). @agent-ui/a2ui SHIPPED: validate.ts, surface.ts, naming.ts, catalog.ts (model), conformance.ts. The 3 component barrels shipped (s17), CSS barrels use bare `@import @agent-ui/shared/*` (must be vite-served). index.html removed at G0 — the /site reintroduces a vite dev/build entry.
_about.resolved: Root-marking (SPEC-R3 AC1): the surface root is the component with id:'root' — the 2-line payload's Button has id:'root'; a 2nd id:'root' => IDGRAPH. Validate granularity (ADR-0002): the renderer host calls validateA2ui id-graph at FINALIZE; tree (LLD-C4) eager-guards 2nd-root/cycle in-stream. Default catalog (catalog SPEC §5.2): Button -> ui-button (variant->variant; triggers action). Minimal canvas = Button only (no Text/binding/repeat).

_waves._model: Build-against-the-LLD-interfaces + stubs (the A1 decomp's 'partial' model): pin the small inter-module interfaces up front (wave 0), then fan out wave 1 wide; the REAL render proof integrates at the host (wave 3) and the canvas (wave 4) — the canvas IS the integration proof. Tracks A (/site) and B (A2UI) are file-disjoint => fully concurrent.

_dependency_edges: B-widget -> B0 (createWidget iface) + registry API; built vs a STUB factory (real factory wired at host)
B-tree -> B0 (createWidget iface) + dispatch + surface(shipped); built vs a STUB widget
B-host -> parser,dispatch,tree,widget,surface(shipped),validate(shipped),action,registry,factory,catalogjson (replaces stubs with real modules; validates at finalize)
B-canvas -> B-host + A1 (vite entry; the canvas page lives in /site)

_files_touched._collision_hotspots: renderer/index.ts + catalog/index.ts barrels are multi-writer — assign ALL barrel edits to the integration slices (B-host owns renderer/index.ts; B0 or B-host owns catalog/index.ts). Each wave-1 module slice CREATES its own file and does NOT edit a barrel. a2ui/package.json (the @agent-ui/components dep) is a single-owner edit (B-factory or B0).
_files_touched.A1: site/index.html (shell), site/main.ts, vite.config.ts, root package.json (dev/build scripts)
_files_touched.A5: site/index.html (nav/landing — enriches A1's shell, wave 3 so no concurrency with A1)
_files_touched.B0: a2ui/src/catalog/types.ts (hoist WidgetFactory) OR protocol.ts addition; pin interfaces (parseLine/dispatch/createWidget); barrel-ownership rule
_files_touched.B-canvas: site/pages/a2ui-canvas.{ts,html-partial} (lives in /site, uses A1's vite entry)

_flags.root_marking: RESOLVED — root = component with id:'root' (SPEC-R3 AC1). No open question.
_flags.validate_finalize: CONFIRMED — host validates id-graph at finalize (ADR-0002); tree eager-guards 2nd-root/cycle. A build-note on B-host, not an open question.
_flags.widgetfactory_type: DECISION — pin WidgetFactory in a shipped location (protocol.ts or catalog/types.ts) in B0 so B-registry + B-factory + B-widget parallelize without a cross-worktree type dep.
_flags.barrels: COORDINATION — renderer/index.ts + catalog/index.ts are multi-writer; integration slices own barrel edits (see _files_touched._collision_hotspots).
_flags.vite_entry: NOTE — A1 reopens the parked 'app build/dev entry' decision (plan §12); /site IS that entry now.
_flags.stub_integration_risk: the wide wave-1 fan-out builds tree/widget against stubs; the real render proof lands at B-host (wave 3) + B-canvas (wave 4). The canvas is the integration proof. If team-lead prefers fewer stubs, serialize: B-widget->wave2 (after factory), B-tree->wave3 (after widget), B-host->wave4, B-canvas->wave5 (deeper, less parallel).

nodes.label: vite dev/build entry + /site bootstrap (tokens-first CSS, self-defining modules)
nodes.acceptance: npm run dev serves /site; foundation CSS (tokens first) + button.css resolve via vite; a <ui-button> self-defines and renders. npm run build emits the site.

nodes.label: permutations grid — sizes x variants x disabled, bare + icon-slot
nodes.acceptance: the grid renders every size(sm/md/lg) x variant x disabled permutation, both bare-label and icon-slot; [scale]/[density] wrappers visibly change geometry.

nodes.label: interaction-states showcase — hover/focus/active/keyboard
nodes.acceptance: hover, :focus-visible, active, and Space/Enter activation states are all visibly demonstrated on live ui-buttons.

nodes.label: frontmatter -> doc page (button.md)
nodes.acceptance: the page renders the API table from button.md frontmatter + the prose body, alongside live examples; the frontmatter parse is the same shape the contract trip-wire reads.

nodes.label: site index / nav (integration)
nodes.acceptance: the landing page indexes + links the permutations, states, doc, and a2ui-canvas pages; one coherent site.

nodes.label: interface prep — pin WidgetFactory + module signatures + barrel ownership
nodes.acceptance: WidgetFactory pinned in a shipped location; parseLine/dispatch/createWidget signatures confirmed from the LLDs; the barrel-edit ownership rule recorded — so wave 1 builds without cross-worktree type deps.

nodes.label: parser.ts (r-c1) — JSONL -> messages, fault-isolated
nodes.acceptance: parseLine(line) returns a message or a ParseError; a malformed line -> PARSE and the stream continues (SPEC-R1 AC2 / N4).

nodes.label: dispatch.ts (r-c2) — version-aware envelope routing
nodes.acceptance: routes the 5 server message kinds by version+key to handlers; unsupported version -> VERSION_UNSUPPORTED; unknown key -> SCHEMA. Tested against hand-built messages.

nodes.label: registry.ts (cat-c3) — CatalogRegistry (two-tier)
nodes.acceptance: register/get/supportedCatalogIds; a component without a factory -> CATALOG_FACTORY_MISSING; duplicate catalogId last-wins. Tested with a synthetic catalog (no real control needed).

nodes.label: default/catalog.json + index (cat-c4) — Button declaration
nodes.acceptance: the default catalog declares Button (variant prop; triggers action) mapping to ui-button; loadCatalog accepts it; absent types are omitted/experimental (no silent dead types, SPEC-N2).

nodes.label: default/factories.ts (cat-c5) — Button -> ui-button WidgetFactory
nodes.acceptance: the Button factory creates a ui-button and maps variant->variant, label->textContent; registering it against catalog.json passes (factory present for every declared type).

nodes.label: action.ts (r-c9) — action dispatch + actionResponse correlation
nodes.acceptance: emitAction builds the action client-message (actionId/wantResponse/sourceComponentId/context); actionResponse correlates + resolves; unknown actionId dropped with a warning. Injected id/timestamp providers (testable).

nodes.label: widget.ts (r-c7) — widget factory / catalog resolver
nodes.dep: B0 (createWidget iface) + registry API; vs a STUB factory
nodes.acceptance: createWidget resolves a component type against the bound catalog -> a widget; unknown type -> placeholder + CATALOG (siblings still render). Logic proven vs a synthetic factory; real factory wired at B-host.

nodes.label: tree.ts (r-c4) — buffer + tree reconstructor, render-on-root
nodes.dep: B0 (createWidget iface) + dispatch + surface(shipped); vs a STUB widget
nodes.acceptance: buffers components by id, reconstructs via child/children, renders on a valid root (id:'root'); 2nd root / cycle -> IDGRAPH eager; out-of-order child held + patched. Logic proven vs a stub createWidget.

nodes.label: renderer.ts (r-c13) — host / orchestrator (integration)
nodes.dep: parser, dispatch, tree, widget, surface, validate, action, registry, factory, catalogjson
nodes.acceptance: mount/ingest/onClientMessage/dispose wired; the real default catalog (registry.register(catalog, factories)) replaces the stubs; validateA2ui id-graph called at FINALIZE (ADR-0002); a streamed multi-message fixture renders into a real ui-button (the A1 integration proof). Owns the renderer/catalog barrels.

nodes.label: a2ui-canvas page (integration) — payload -> live ui-button
nodes.acceptance: the canvas mounts the renderer host, feeds the 2-line payload (createSurface{catalogId:'default'} + updateComponents{[{id:'root',component:'Button',variant:'solid',label:'Click me'}]}) -> a LIVE, clickable ui-button; 0 CATALOG errors; clicking emits an A2UI action logged on the canvas (the 'show A2UI working' payoff).

actions.label: /site is vite-served; tokens-first CSS + barrels resolve; a ui-button self-defines
every size x variant x disabled permutation (bare + icon) renders
the button's API table + prose render from button.md frontmatter
the site indexes + links its pages
the inter-module interfaces + shared types are pinned (WidgetFactory, createWidget, dispatch) + barrel ownership
JSONL lines parse to messages; a bad line -> PARSE, the stream continues
route the envelope by version+key to handlers; unknown -> SCHEMA/VERSION_UNSUPPORTED
the default catalog declares Button -> ui-button (no silent dead types)
the Button WidgetFactory creates ui-button + maps variant/label
a click emits an A2UI action client-message + correlates actionResponse
resolve component type -> factory -> element; unknown -> placeholder + CATALOG
buffer by id, reconstruct via child/children, render-on-root (id:'root')
orchestrate mount/ingest/dispose; validate at finalize; the integration proof
feed the 2-line payload -> a LIVE ui-button on the canvas; 0 CATALOG; click->action log
